name: Fresh Fruit Melange
recipeIngredient: 1 medium honeydew melon, cut into balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Gently toss the sliced strawberries, blueberries, kiwi slices, diced cantaloupe, and diced honeydew melon in a large bowl.
2. Add the chopped mint leaves to the fruit mixture and gently stir to combine.
3. In a separate small bowl, whisk together the fresh orange juice, fresh lemon juice, and sugar until well mixed.
4. Pour the dressing over the fruit mixture and toss gently to coat evenly.
5. Transfer the fruit melange to a serving dish or individual glasses.
6. Garnish with whole mint leaves.
7. Serve chilled.
